summary.en: Front office software suite for college sports athletic departments.
summary.zh: 為大學運動體育部門打造的前台管理軟體套件。

highlight.en: Helps athletic departments manage roster limits and athlete pay caps using custom compensation frameworks and what-if playgrounds now that athlete pay is legal.
highlight.zh: 在運動員獲取收入合法化後，協助大型體育部門透過自訂薪酬架構與情境模擬，管理名單上限與球員薪資帽。

summary.en: A Starbucks-style loyalty and rewards app for restaurants.
summary.zh: 為餐廳打造的星巴克式忠誠度與獎勵應用程式。

highlight.en: Brings the kind of branded app rewards program that powers chains like Starbucks to independent and smaller restaurants.
highlight.zh: 把星巴克等連鎖品牌所仰賴的品牌應用程式獎勵計畫，帶給獨立與小型餐廳。

summary.en: Building playful consumer apps for AI-generated video.
summary.zh: 打造充滿樂趣的 AI 影片消費性應用程式。

highlight.en: Its app Taffy lets friends and partners turn favorite memories and inside jokes into AI animations.
highlight.zh: 旗下應用程式 Taffy 讓朋友與伴侶把珍貴回憶與默契笑話變成 AI 動畫。

summary.en: Backend-as-a-service that lets Flutter and Dart developers go full-stack.
summary.zh: 讓 Flutter 與 Dart 開發者邁向全端的後端即服務平台。

highlight.en: Introduces "Cloud Widgets" so developers declaratively define their entire backend in Dart using patterns they know from Flutter, with no extra tooling.
highlight.zh: 推出「Cloud Widgets」原語，讓開發者沿用 Flutter 既有模式以 Dart 宣告式定義整個後端，無須額外工具。

summary.en: A coding agent built specifically for Android engineers.
summary.zh: 專為 Android 工程師打造的程式碼代理。

highlight.en: Installs in one click from the IntelliJ marketplace and uniquely taps the emulator, Compose previews, and LSP tools while tracking the latest Android SDKs.
highlight.zh: 可從 IntelliJ 市集一鍵安裝，獨家整合模擬器、Compose 預覽與 LSP 工具，並隨時跟進最新 Android SDK。

summary.en: A platform to create and run autonomous companies operated by AI.
summary.zh: 用於建立並營運 AI 自主公司的平台。

highlight.en: From a single prompt, spins up an AI-run company that maximizes revenue and tries to avoid bankruptcy with no human intervention.
highlight.zh: 僅需一段提示，即可建立由 AI 自主營運的公司，在無人干預下追求營收最大化並避免破產。

summary.en: Gives non-technical team members AI agents that work out of the box.
summary.zh: 為非技術團隊成員提供開箱即用的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Lets non-technical staff put ready-made agents to work immediately, without engineering setup.
highlight.zh: 讓非技術人員無須工程設定，即可立刻使用現成的 AI 代理。

summary.en: A platform that continuously improves your AI through one API.
summary.zh: 透過單一 API 持續優化你的 AI 的平台。

highlight.en: Boosts rate limits, cuts latency, and raises accuracy for LLMs through one simple API.
highlight.zh: 透過一個簡單 API 為 LLM 提升速率上限、降低延遲並提高準確度。

summary.en: An AI search engine that surfaces insights from social media.
summary.zh: 整合社群媒體洞察的 AI 搜尋引擎。

highlight.en: Instead of appending "reddit" to a query and wading through threads, users get social media discussions processed onto a single page to decide faster.
highlight.zh: 使用者不必在搜尋後加上「reddit」再逐一翻看討論串，而是在單一頁面取得整理好的社群討論，更快做出決定。

summary.en: An AI hypothesis engine for molecular drug discovery.
summary.zh: 用於分子藥物探索的 AI 假說引擎。

highlight.en: Builds an autonomous AI scientist focused on neuroinflammation and immunology to develop best-in-class therapies grounded in the molecular basis of disease.
highlight.zh: 打造聚焦神經發炎與免疫學的自主 AI 科學家，以疾病的分子機制為基礎開發同類最佳療法。

summary.en: Personalized disease prevention using genetics and AI.
summary.zh: 結合基因與 AI 的個人化疾病預防。

highlight.en: Its HaploHub SaaS lets genetic labs and providers predict disease risk, host genetic data, and run inference algorithms like phasing without writing code.
highlight.zh: 旗下 HaploHub SaaS 讓基因檢測實驗室與醫療端能預測疾病風險、託管基因資料，並無須寫程式即可執行定相、補插等推論演算法。

summary.en: An AI operating system for veterinary care.
summary.zh: 為獸醫照護打造的 AI 作業系統。

highlight.en: Starts with voice agents that automate front-desk operations at veterinary practices.
highlight.zh: 以自動化獸醫診所前台作業的語音代理作為起點。

summary.en: Stitch Technologies was a UK-based B2B software company.
summary.zh: Stitch Technologies 是一家位於英國的 B2B 軟體公司。

highlight.en: A Winter 2024 YC B2B startup based in the UK that has since shut down; no further details are available in the source.
highlight.zh: 一家 2024 冬季 YC、總部位於英國的 B2B 新創，現已停止營運；來源未提供更多細節。

summary.en: Enterprise-grade generative AI platform built for nursing workflows.
summary.zh: 為護理工作流程打造的企業級生成式 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Designed specifically for nursing to reduce burnout, improve system efficiency, and support high-quality care.
highlight.zh: 專為護理設計，旨在減輕職業倦怠、提升系統效率並支持高品質照護。

summary.en: An open-source, AI-native security automation platform.
summary.zh: 開源、AI 原生的資安自動化平台。

highlight.en: Helps security teams build agents and automate work in mission-critical defense, finance, and federal environments, with an open-source core on GitHub.
highlight.zh: 協助資安團隊在國防、金融與聯邦等關鍵任務環境中建立代理並自動化工作，核心程式碼在 GitHub 開源。

summary.en: Security and compliance tooling for large language models.
summary.zh: 針對大型語言模型的安全與合規工具。

highlight.en: Focuses on LLM security and compliance for teams deploying language models.
highlight.zh: 聚焦於協助部署語言模型的團隊處理 LLM 安全與合規問題。

summary.en: Generate finished video or static ads and refine them in plain English.
summary.zh: 生成成品影片或靜態廣告，並以白話文反覆優化。

highlight.en: Creates finished ads in minutes, then lets you iterate in plain English until they match exactly what you had in mind.
highlight.zh: 幾分鐘內產出成品廣告，接著讓你用白話文反覆修改，直到完全符合心中所想。

summary.en: A vision data foundry building datasets and evals for visual AI.
summary.zh: 為視覺 AI 打造資料集與評測的視覺資料工坊。

highlight.en: Builds high-fidelity environments, evals, and supervised datasets to push the frontier of artificial visual intelligence.
highlight.zh: 打造高擬真環境、評測與監督式資料集，推進人工視覺智慧的前沿。

summary.en: Helps stock brokerages settle trades instantly.
summary.zh: 協助證券經紀商即時完成交易清算。

highlight.en: Builds infrastructure that lets stock brokerages settle trades instantly rather than waiting through standard settlement cycles.
highlight.zh: 打造基礎設施，讓證券經紀商即時完成交易清算，而非等待標準清算週期。

summary.en: A full-stack insurance carrier building products for startups.
summary.zh: 為新創打造保險產品的全端保險承保公司。

highlight.en: As a carrier rather than a broker, it underwrites and issues policies directly, cutting out intermediaries to tailor coverage and price risk more efficiently.
highlight.zh: 作為承保公司而非經紀商，直接核保與簽發保單，省去中介以更有效率地量身設計保障並定價風險。

summary.en: Run AI-led qualitative interviews to reach confident decisions in days.
summary.zh: 以 AI 主導的質性訪談，數日內做出有把握的決策。

highlight.en: An AI co-worker designs research studies, interviews real people, and analyzes the videos, delivering actionable consumer and user insights at scale.
highlight.zh: AI 同事負責設計研究、訪談真實受訪者並分析影片，大規模產出可行動的消費者與使用者洞察。

summary.en: An AI tax assistant for tax professionals and businesses.
summary.zh: 為稅務專業人士與企業打造的 AI 稅務助理。

highlight.en: An AI co-pilot for accountants that automates tax research, client communication, onboarding, and secure document collection.
highlight.zh: 為會計師打造的 AI 副駕，自動化稅務研究、客戶溝通、上手流程與安全文件收集。

summary.en: An agentic operating system for home energy installers.
summary.zh: 為居家能源安裝商打造的代理式作業系統。

highlight.en: Unifies installers' detached CRM, ERP, and planning tools into one WhatsApp/iMessage interface, using LiDAR and computer vision to save 24+ hours per project.
highlight.zh: 把安裝商各自為政的 CRM、ERP 與規劃工具整合進單一 WhatsApp／iMessage 介面，並運用 LiDAR 與電腦視覺，為每件熱泵、太陽能或電池專案節省逾 24 小時。

summary.en: An AppleCare-like embedded warranty program for any retailer.
summary.zh: 為各類零售商打造的 AppleCare 式嵌入保固方案。

highlight.en: Lets e-commerce merchants embed AppleCare-style product warranties at checkout in under 10 minutes, generating incremental revenue at zero cost to the merchant.
highlight.zh: 讓電商商家在 10 分鐘內於結帳流程嵌入 AppleCare 式產品保固，為商家帶來額外營收且零成本。

summary.en: An AI-native organic growth engine for financial advisors.
summary.zh: 為理財顧問打造的 AI 原生有機成長引擎。

highlight.en: Tackles advisors' biggest pain by identifying the right prospects within their niche, replacing a process that takes 60+ hours of development per new client.
highlight.zh: 瞄準顧問最大的痛點，協助在其利基中找出合適潛在客戶，取代過去每成交一名新客戶可能需要逾 60 小時的開發流程。

summary.en: An AI-native office leasing broker for smaller, flexible spaces.
summary.zh: 專注於小型彈性空間的 AI 原生辦公室租賃經紀。

highlight.en: Its AI co-pilot delivers a white-glove B2B office search for smaller units and shorter terms that traditional brokerage ignores, serving NY, SF, and Boston.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 副駕為傳統經紀忽視的小型空間與短租期提供白手套式 B2B 辦公室搜尋，服務紐約、舊金山與波士頓。

summary.en: Makes it easy for insurance companies to process claims.
summary.zh: 讓保險公司更輕鬆地處理理賠。

highlight.en: Acts as a third-party administrator that blends AI with expert staff to handle outsourced claim operations faster and with fewer mistakes.
highlight.zh: 作為第三方理賠管理機構，結合 AI 與專家團隊處理外包理賠作業，更快且更少出錯。

summary.en: Automates deal decks for commercial real estate brokers.
summary.zh: 為商業地產經紀自動產生交易簡報。

highlight.en: An AI copilot that merges a brokerage's internal data with external sources to generate deal decks in seconds, a task that normally consumes 20+ hours a week.
highlight.zh: 一款 AI 副駕，整合經紀商內部資料與外部來源，在數秒內生成交易簡報，取代通常每週耗時逾 20 小時的工作。

summary.en: AI agents that scale AML, KYB, and KYC operations.
summary.zh: 用於擴展 AML、KYB 與 KYC 作業的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Replaces human compliance analysts with AI agents that automate 80% of manual work across screening, onboarding, and transaction monitoring.
highlight.zh: 以 AI 代理取代人工合規分析師，為銀行與金融科技自動化篩查、客戶上手與交易監控中 80% 的人工工作。

summary.en: An AI-powered ERP for construction companies.
summary.zh: 為營造公司打造的 AI 驅動 ERP。

highlight.en: Unifies project management, materials, finance, estimating, and CRM into one platform, replacing the 8-17 tools construction firms typically juggle.
highlight.zh: 將專案管理、物料、財務、估價與 CRM 整合進單一平台，取代營造公司通常並用的 8 至 17 種工具。

summary.en: Compliance and back-office workflow software for wealth managers.
summary.zh: 為財富管理機構打造的合規與後台工作流程軟體。

highlight.en: An AI-powered operating system that automates investment research and operations for wealth managers, supporting 200+ firms managing over £35bn in assets.
highlight.zh: 一套 AI 驅動的作業系統，為財富管理機構自動化投資研究與營運，支援逾 200 家、管理超過 350 億英鎊資產的公司。

summary.en: Helps furniture companies create product visuals with AI.
summary.zh: 協助家具公司以 AI 製作產品視覺。

highlight.en: Its generative AI core is optimized specifically for furniture, offering a faster, cheaper alternative to the photoshoots and CGI brands spend millions on.
highlight.zh: 其生成式 AI 核心專為家具優化，相較品牌每年耗費數百萬的攝影與 CGI，提供更快更便宜的方案。

summary.en: AI infrastructure that monetizes America's empty truck space.
summary.zh: 將美國閒置貨車空間變現的 AI 基礎設施。

highlight.en: Uses AI to price, match, and sell the 50% of U.S. truck space that goes unused, cutting shipper costs up to 50% versus traditional LTL.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 為佔比達 50% 的美國閒置貨車空間定價、配對與銷售，以倉到倉直送將貨主成本較傳統零擔運輸最高降低 50%。

summary.en: Done-for-you payroll, benefits, and compliance for startups.
summary.zh: 為新創全代辦的薪資、福利與合規服務。

highlight.en: Rather than handing founders software, it uses AI agents and human experts to actually do payroll, benefits, compliance, and taxes, saving 10+ hours a month.
highlight.zh: 不是把軟體丟給創辦人，而是以 AI 代理與專家實際代辦薪資、福利、合規、會計與稅務，每月省下逾 10 小時。

summary.en: AI agents that automate debt-collection outreach.
summary.zh: 自動化催收聯繫的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Automates debt-collection calls, texts, and emails for financial services and healthcare, working with some of the world's largest financial institutions.
highlight.zh: 為金融服務與醫療業自動化催收電話、簡訊與電子郵件，並與全球最大型的金融機構合作。

summary.en: Builds AI agents that real teams can rely on for critical work.
summary.zh: 打造團隊可信賴用於關鍵工作的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Optimizes for adoption over spectacle, building useful, accountable agent systems; backed by a $30M seed from Spark Capital, Felicis, and Y Combinator.
highlight.zh: 以實用採用而非炫技為目標，打造有用且可究責的代理系統；獲 Spark Capital、Felicis 與 Y Combinator 的 3,000 萬美元種子輪支持。

summary.en: Tooling to look inside AI models via interpretability and alignment.
summary.zh: 透過可解釋性與對齊深入觀察 AI 模型的工具。

highlight.en: Works at the intersection of reinforcement learning, interpretability, alignment, and data to understand what happens inside models.
highlight.zh: 在強化學習、可解釋性、對齊與資料的交會處，致力於理解模型內部的運作。

summary.en: Drone detection for U.S. defense and national security.
summary.zh: 為美國國防與國家安全打造的無人機偵測。

highlight.en: Builds drone-detection sensors aimed at cost parity with the sub-$1,000 commercial drones that increasingly threaten multi-million-dollar defense assets.
highlight.zh: 打造無人機偵測感測器，力求與單價不到 1,000 美元、卻日益威脅數百萬美元國防資產的商用無人機達成成本對等。

summary.en: A data research company developing data for advanced AI.
summary.zh: 為先進 AI 開發資料的資料研究公司。

highlight.en: Its Cloud-Native Agent Dataset Factory turns evaluation and training data generation from manual and inconsistent into automated and scalable.
highlight.zh: 其雲原生代理資料集工廠把評測與訓練資料的產生從人工、不一致轉為自動化、可擴展，服務頂尖 AI 實驗室與財星 500 大企業。

summary.en: An AI platform for winning defense and government contracts.
summary.zh: 用於贏得國防與政府合約的 AI 平台。

highlight.en: Its AI monitors $8 trillion in annual government spending across 60+ nations and instantly matches companies to relevant contracts.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 監測逾 60 個國家、每年達 8 兆美元的政府支出，並即時為企業配對相關合約。

summary.en: An orchestration layer to turn product ideas into physical goods.
summary.zh: 把產品點子轉為實體商品的協作層平台。

highlight.en: Uses generative AI to visualize a creator's idea, break it into components, and match each step to a factory, shrinking 6-12 month timelines to weeks.
highlight.zh: 運用生成式 AI 將創作者的點子視覺化、拆解為零件與製程，並為每個步驟配對工廠，把 6 至 12 個月的時程縮短到數週。

summary.en: Uses AI to automate quality assurance for customer support.
summary.zh: 以 AI 自動化客戶支援的品質保證。

highlight.en: Evaluates 100% of customer support interactions in real time at half the cost, versus the under-5% that enterprises typically review manually.
highlight.zh: 即時評估全部客服互動且成本減半，相較企業通常僅人工抽查不到 5% 的比例。

summary.en: Streamlines medical record review in workers' compensation.
summary.zh: 簡化勞工賠償領域的病歷審閱流程。

highlight.en: Structures and deduplicates disorganized medical PDFs, highlighting content most relevant to a specialty or injury so physicians and adjusters save hours.
highlight.zh: 整理並去重雜亂的病歷 PDF，標出與特定專科或傷情最相關的內容，為醫師與理賠人員省下大量時間。

summary.en: Autonomous accounting software for every business.
summary.zh: 為各類企業打造的自主會計軟體。

highlight.en: Aims to give business owners with no financial expertise the same fingertip financial insights only big enterprises with dedicated finance teams enjoy today.
highlight.zh: 目標是讓沒有財務專業的企業主，也能即時取得目前僅有專屬財務團隊的大型企業才享有的財務洞察。

summary.en: Medical record retrieval with zero human error.
summary.zh: 零人為錯誤的病歷調閱服務。

highlight.en: Uses AI to compile and analyze documents scattered across EHRs, providers, and faxes for law firms, providers, and more.
highlight.zh: 運用 AI 為律師事務所、醫療端等彙整並分析散落於 EHR、醫療提供者與傳真之間的文件。

summary.en: Automates security and privacy reviews with AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 自動化資安與隱私審查。

highlight.en: Built by engineers who ran hundreds of reviews at Amazon and Moveworks, it lets users complete security and privacy reviews in minutes instead of days.
highlight.zh: 由曾在 Amazon 與 Moveworks 執行數百次審查的工程師打造，讓使用者把資安與隱私審查從數天縮短到數分鐘完成。

summary.en: Autonomous freight coordination without human coordinators.
summary.zh: 無須人工協調員的自主貨運協調。

highlight.en: Builds transparent, tech-driven freight coordination that eliminates the need for human coordinators.
highlight.zh: 打造透明、技術驅動的貨運協調，去除對人工協調員的需求。

summary.en: Building data centers in space to power AI compute.
summary.zh: 在太空中建造資料中心以支援 AI 運算。

highlight.en: Launched Starcloud-1 just 21 months after founding with an Nvidia H100, becoming the first to train an LLM and run Gemini in space.
highlight.zh: 創立僅 21 個月便發射搭載 Nvidia H100 的 Starcloud-1，成為首個在太空訓練 LLM 並執行 Gemini 的團隊。

summary.en: An AI-native HOA management company.
summary.zh: AI 原生的社區管委會（HOA）管理公司。

highlight.en: Combines professional expertise with intelligent software to make HOAs less reactive and confusing, managing communities in the Bay Area and Greater LA.
highlight.zh: 結合專業經驗與智慧軟體，讓社區管委會運作不再被動且混亂，管理舊金山灣區與大洛杉磯地區的社區。

summary.en: An AI-native operating system for behavioral health clinics.
summary.zh: 為行為健康診所打造的 AI 原生作業系統。

highlight.en: Replaces disconnected legacy systems with one platform combining a purpose-built EHR, CRM, and RCM with AI workers for documentation, admissions, and billing.
highlight.zh: 以單一平台取代各自為政的舊系統，整合專屬 EHR、CRM、RCM，並以 AI 工作者處理病歷紀錄、收治與帳務。

summary.en: Uses AI to find and resolve issues in data center operations.
summary.zh: 以 AI 發現並解決資料中心營運問題。

highlight.en: Detects and automatically resolves issues in data center engineering and operations to ensure efficiency and uptime.
highlight.zh: 偵測並自動解決資料中心工程與營運中的問題，以確保效率與正常運行時間。

summary.en: An AI co-pilot for sales reps at industrial wholesale distributors.
summary.zh: 為工業批發經銷商業務員打造的 AI 副駕。

highlight.en: An all-in-one AI sales platform for counter and inside sales across HVAC/R, plumbing, electrical, and other industrial wholesale distributors.
highlight.zh: 一站式 AI 銷售平台，服務暖通空調冷凍、水電等工業批發經銷商的櫃檯與內勤業務。

summary.en: AI voice agents built to sell over the phone.
summary.zh: 專為電話銷售打造的 AI 語音代理。

highlight.en: Its voice agents know every product SKU and are trained on top reps, already outperforming trained live reps by 30% on conversion and upsell.
highlight.zh: 其語音代理熟知每一個產品 SKU 並以頂尖業務的話術訓練，在轉換與加購上已較受訓真人業務高出 30%。

summary.en: A sovereign operating system for intelligence in regulated institutions.
summary.zh: 為受監管機構打造的主權式情報作業系統。

highlight.en: Runs entirely inside enterprise infrastructure with no data egress, turning proprietary data into auditable, decision-grade reports and documentation.
highlight.zh: 完全在企業基礎設施內運行且資料不外流，將專有資料轉化為可稽核、可供決策的成品，如盡職調查與法規報告。

summary.en: Simulation and evaluation platform that scales voice and chat AI agents.
summary.zh: 用於擴展語音與聊天 AI 代理的模擬與評測平台。

highlight.en: Simulates thousands of scenarios so engineers don't test manually, with CI/CD evaluations that automatically detect regressions in autonomous agents.
highlight.zh: 模擬數千種情境，讓工程師免於人工測試，並以 CI/CD 評測自動偵測自主代理的退步。

summary.en: A memory layer for AI agents and assistants.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理與助理打造的記憶層。

highlight.en: Gives AI assistants an intelligent memory layer that remembers user preferences and learns over time, ideal for support chatbots and autonomous systems.
highlight.zh: 為 AI 助理提供智慧記憶層，能記住使用者偏好並持續學習，特別適合支援聊天機器人與自主系統。

summary.en: AI call centers built from a company's own call recordings.
summary.zh: 以企業既有通話錄音打造的 AI 客服中心。

highlight.en: Turns existing call recordings into an "AI vocal twin" on a proprietary deterministic LLM that is cheaper and more accurate than GPT-4o for call inquiries.
highlight.zh: 把既有通話錄音變成「AI 聲音分身」，建基於自有的確定性 LLM，在客服查詢上比 GPT-4o 更便宜且更準確。

summary.en: Personal home robots, shipping their first units in 2025.
summary.zh: 於 2025 年出貨首批的居家個人機器人。

highlight.en: Its robot Isaac autonomously tidies messes, folds laundry, and cares for the home, with the first 30 units shipping in fall 2025.
highlight.zh: 其機器人 Isaac 能自主整理雜亂、摺衣物並照看居家，首批 30 台將於 2025 年秋季出貨。

summary.en: AI voice agents for mortgage servicing.
summary.zh: 為房貸服務打造的 AI 語音代理。

highlight.en: Helps mortgage servicers collect payments, verify new borrowers, and qualify loan inquiries over the phone, built by founders from Redfin and Verkada.
highlight.zh: 協助房貸服務機構透過電話收款、驗證新借款人並篩選貸款詢問，由出身 Redfin 與 Verkada 的創辦人打造。

summary.en: Automates office work for residential contractors.
summary.zh: 為住宅承包商自動化辦公室作業。

highlight.en: Uses AI receptionists and an LLM-based quoting tool atop its own CRM to manage jobs end-to-end, from lead to quote to scheduling, staffing, and payment.
highlight.zh: 在自有 CRM 上結合 AI 接待員與 LLM 報價工具，從接案、報價、排程、派工到收款，端到端管理整個工作流程。

summary.en: An AI-native broker that automates and maximizes tariff refunds.
summary.zh: 自動化並最大化關稅退款的 AI 原生報關行。

highlight.en: Automates duty drawback to recover the roughly $15B in eligible tariff refunds that go unclaimed each year, built by founders from MIT, Amazon, and Flexport.
highlight.zh: 自動化退稅流程，協助追回每年約 150 億美元未申領的合格關稅退款，由出身 MIT、Amazon 與 Flexport 的創辦人打造。

summary.en: Provides data for audio AI.
summary.zh: 為音訊 AI 提供資料。

highlight.en: Builds data specifically for training and improving audio AI systems.
highlight.zh: 專門為訓練與優化音訊 AI 系統打造資料。

summary.en: A USDC-powered smart neobank for Latinos.
summary.zh: 為拉丁裔打造的 USDC 智慧新型銀行。

highlight.en: Uses a USDC global wallet to fix costly, fragmented cross-border payments across Latin America; its P2P onramp drew $540k in deposits and 10k users in 20 days.
highlight.zh: 以 USDC 全球錢包解決拉美 33 國昂貴且分裂的跨境支付問題；其 P2P 入金管道在 20 天內吸引 54 萬美元存款與 1 萬名使用者。

summary.en: Automates circuit board (PCB) design using AI.
summary.zh: 以 AI 自動化電路板（PCB）設計。

highlight.en: Works with hardware companies to automate PCB design and get them the boards they need quickly.
highlight.zh: 與硬體公司合作自動化 PCB 設計，讓他們更快取得所需的電路板。

summary.en: An ultra-low-latency inference cloud for real-time AI workloads.
summary.zh: 為即時 AI 工作負載打造的超低延遲推論雲。

highlight.en: Pairs optimized runtimes that meet latency and throughput SLAs with orchestration that auto-scales and routes workloads across clusters and regions.
highlight.zh: 將符合延遲與吞吐 SLA 的最佳化運行環境，搭配能跨叢集與區域自動擴展並調度工作負載的協調機制，且兼顧成本效益。

summary.en: Real-time AI audit platform for healthcare revenue and compliance.
summary.zh: 為醫療營收與合規打造的即時 AI 稽核平台。

highlight.en: Its agents learn each practice's workflows and payer rules; it has processed over 1M patient encounters and supports hundreds of locations nationwide.
highlight.zh: 其代理會自學每家診所的工作流程與付款方規則；已處理逾 100 萬次就診紀錄，並支援全美數百個據點。

summary.en: A Rippling-style HR platform for seasonal and dynamic workforces.
summary.zh: 為季節性與動態人力打造的 Rippling 式人資平台。

highlight.en: Automates credential collection, AI-assisted activation, and perpetual compliance for companies with high-turnover, seasonal staffing needs.
highlight.zh: 為人員流動高、季節性用工需求的公司自動化證件收集、AI 輔助上工與持續合規。

summary.en: Production-grade extraction of unstructured documents into LLM inputs.
summary.zh: 將非結構化文件轉為 LLM 輸入的量產級擷取服務。

highlight.en: Its API converts complex documents in any format, from PDFs to Word and Excel, into LLM-ready inputs and integrates into existing data pipelines in minutes.
highlight.zh: 其 API 可將 PDF、Word、Excel 等各種格式的複雜文件轉為 LLM 可用的輸入，並在數分鐘內整合進既有資料管線。

summary.en: Query enterprise databases and systems in natural language.
summary.zh: 以自然語言查詢企業資料庫與系統。

highlight.en: Transforms databases so they can be queried in plain language; consultancy RISE uses it to analyze expenses across its organization without relying on Excel.
highlight.zh: 改造資料庫使其可用白話文查詢；顧問公司 RISE 以此分析全公司支出，無須仰賴 Excel。

summary.en: Lets wealthy Indians invest in global equities from India.
summary.zh: 讓印度高資產人士從印度投資全球股票。

highlight.en: A mobile app handling outward remittance, advisory investing, and cross-border tax filing so Indians can escape the INR's ~2-5% yearly drop against the USD.
highlight.zh: 一款行動應用程式，處理對外匯款、顧問投資與跨境報稅，讓印度人擺脫盧比兌美元每年約 2 至 5% 的貶值。

summary.en: An AI QA engineer that tests websites with natural language.
summary.zh: 以自然語言測試網站的 AI 品保工程師。

highlight.en: Handles and automates all functional and end-to-end testing so teams never code another test or hire an external QA team.
highlight.zh: 處理並自動化所有功能與端到端測試，讓團隊不必再撰寫測試或外聘品保團隊。

summary.en: The enablement layer for physical AI safety certification.
summary.zh: 為實體 AI 安全認證打造的賦能層。

highlight.en: Provides the easiest way for hardware products like industrial robots and heavy machinery to get safety certified and reach market faster.
highlight.zh: 為工業機器人、重型機械等硬體產品提供最簡便的安全認證途徑，加速上市。

summary.en: A complete QA platform for voice agents.
summary.zh: 為語音代理打造的完整品保平台。

highlight.en: Covers voice agents from pre-deployment testing to production monitoring, having tested 4M+ calls and monitored 10K+ agents with 50+ built-in metrics.
highlight.zh: 涵蓋語音代理從部署前測試到上線監控的全程，已測試逾 400 萬通電話、監控逾 1 萬個代理，並內建 50 多項指標。

summary.en: Open-source reinforcement learning and fine-tuning for LLMs.
summary.zh: 為 LLM 打造的開源強化學習與微調工具。

highlight.en: Uses custom kernels to train custom models up to 30x faster with 90% less memory, with 10M+ monthly downloads and 40K GitHub stars.
highlight.zh: 運用自訂核心讓自訂模型訓練速度最高快 30 倍、記憶體用量減少 90%，月下載量逾千萬、GitHub 星數達 4 萬。

summary.en: Back-office AI for freight brokers automating freight bill audits, AP, and AR.
summary.zh: 為貨運經紀自動化運費帳單稽核、應付與應收的後台 AI。

highlight.en: Automates FTL and LTL freight bill auditing so 70-85% of emails go untouched, helping brokers invoice 36% faster and cut back-office costs by 40%.
highlight.zh: 自動化整車與零擔運費帳單稽核，讓 70 至 85% 的郵件無須人工處理，協助經紀開立發票快 36%、後台成本降 40%。

summary.en: An AI agent for automating accounts receivable.
summary.zh: 用於自動化應收帳款的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Connects fragmented data across QuickBooks, Stripe, NetSuite, DocuSign, HubSpot, and Salesforce, then uses LLMs to fully automate the manual AR workflow.
highlight.zh: 串接散落於 QuickBooks、Stripe、NetSuite、DocuSign、HubSpot 與 Salesforce 的資料，再以 LLM 全自動化原本人工的應收流程。

summary.en: A video generation engine for the creator economy.
summary.zh: 為創作者經濟打造的影片生成引擎。

highlight.en: Provides a video generation engine purpose-built for creators producing content at scale.
highlight.zh: 為大量產製內容的創作者打造專屬的影片生成引擎。

summary.en: A modern estate settlement platform, from discovery to distribution.
summary.zh: 現代化的遺產處理平台，從查核到分配一手包辦。

highlight.en: Surfaces verified assets and debts after a death and turns discovery into a clear inheritance map, in a $250B+ market where executors spend 400+ hours manually.
highlight.zh: 在身故後查出經驗證的資產與債務，並把查核轉化為清晰的繼承藍圖，瞄準執行人需手動耗費逾 400 小時、規模逾 2,500 億美元的市場。

summary.en: An AI supply chain manager for consumer packaged goods.
summary.zh: 為消費性包裝商品打造的 AI 供應鏈經理。

highlight.en: Its AI, Agnes, decides what to produce, where to make it, and how to move it, simulating thousands of options in seconds and executing the best plan.
highlight.zh: 其 AI「Agnes」決定生產什麼、在哪製造與如何運送，數秒內模擬數千種方案並執行最佳計畫。

summary.en: Healthcare personal assistants for Medicare patients.
summary.zh: 為 Medicare 病患提供的醫療個人助理。

highlight.en: Matches Medicare's 68 million patients with patient advocates at little to no cost, a benefit Medicare began covering in 2024, to help them navigate care.
highlight.zh: 為 Medicare 的 6,800 萬名病患媒合幾乎免費的病患倡導者，協助其在醫療體系中導航；該福利自 2024 年起納入 Medicare 給付。

summary.en: GPS-denied navigation software for drones.
summary.zh: 為無人機打造的拒止 GPS 環境導航軟體。

highlight.en: Computes position fixes passively from onboard cameras, inertial sensors, and satellite imagery, so the system can't be jammed and has no RF signature.
highlight.zh: 以機載相機、慣性感測器與衛星影像被動推算定位，因此無法被干擾且不留任何射頻訊號。

summary.en: A user infrastructure platform.
summary.zh: 使用者基礎設施平台。

highlight.en: Builds a platform that provides user infrastructure for software applications.
highlight.zh: 打造為軟體應用提供使用者基礎設施的平台。

summary.en: Use AI tools without fear of data leakage.
summary.zh: 安心使用 AI 工具，免於資料外洩疑慮。

highlight.en: Lets teams adopt AI tools while guarding against the data leakage risks that come with them.
highlight.zh: 讓團隊在採用 AI 工具的同時，防範隨之而來的資料外洩風險。

summary.en: A Vanta-style compliance platform for carbon regulations.
summary.zh: 為碳合規打造的 Vanta 式合規平台。

highlight.en: Uses LLMs to parse regulations and manage 100,000+ data points across project lifecycles, cutting compliance time 90% at a fifth of the cost of alternatives.
highlight.zh: 運用 LLM 解析法規並管理專案生命週期中逾 10 萬個資料點，將合規時間縮短 90%，成本僅為替代方案的五分之一。

summary.en: An AI agent that resolves complex support tickets end-to-end.
summary.zh: 端到端解決複雜支援工單的 AI 代理。

highlight.en: Sets up in one day without engineers and connects to ticketing systems like Zendesk, Intercom, and Front plus tools like Stripe, Slack, and Linear.
highlight.zh: 一天內即可上線、無須工程師，並串接 Zendesk、Intercom、Front 等工單系統，以及 Stripe、Slack、Linear 等工具。

summary.en: VMware for GPUs, productizing GPU virtualization research.
summary.zh: GPU 界的 VMware，將 GPU 虛擬化研究產品化。

highlight.en: A systems research lab that productionizes GPU virtualization research to deliver step-change utilization gains across its cloud and partner GPU fleets.
highlight.zh: 一間系統研究實驗室，將 GPU 虛擬化研究產品化，為其雲端與合作夥伴的 GPU 機群帶來跳躍式的使用率提升。

summary.en: Foundation models for time series forecasting.
summary.zh: 用於時間序列預測的基礎模型。

highlight.en: Builds planning systems based on its own in-house foundation models for time series.
highlight.zh: 基於自研的時間序列基礎模型，打造各類規劃系統。

summary.en: An AI-native consumer loan servicer.
summary.zh: AI 原生的消費貸款服務商。

highlight.en: Built by founders who ran a $200M specialty finance line at Alt, it streamlines loan payments, borrower engagement, and record-keeping done manually today.
highlight.zh: 由曾在 Alt 經營 2 億美元專業金融業務的創辦人打造，簡化舊式服務中以人工處理的還款、借款人互動與紀錄維護。

summary.en: A collaborative workspace for patent litigators.
summary.zh: 為專利訴訟律師打造的協作工作空間。

highlight.en: Delivers trial-ready work product for patent litigators, fast enough for pitches yet strong enough for court.
highlight.zh: 為專利訴訟律師產出可直接上庭的成果，既快到能用於提案，又紮實到能上法庭。

summary.en: Self-improving software that experiments to boost revenue.
summary.zh: 透過實驗提升營收的自我優化軟體。

highlight.en: AI that continuously experiments on key funnel moments; its first customer, a 20M-MAU social app, uses it to test in-app paywalls and drive more subscriptions.
highlight.zh: 持續在漏斗關鍵環節做實驗的 AI；首位客戶是月活躍 2,000 萬的社交應用，用它測試應用內付費牆以提升訂閱。
